name: Order Hold Rule
description: Configurable rule engine that evaluates order attributes to determine if an order should be held for review.
content: Rule objective: prevent risky or exceptional orders from automatic fulfillment. Decision conditions: configurable filters on order fields. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: set order to OnHold state, record matched rule ID.
aliases: 拦单规则,暂停规则,风控规则,hold规则,拦截规则

name: Order Dispatch Routing Rule
description: Rule set that determines which warehouse should fulfill a given order based on inventory, geography, and custom criteria.
content: Rule objective: optimize warehouse selection for cost and delivery speed. Decision conditions: zipcode range match, country match, inventory availability, custom rules. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: assign warehouse, create dispatch record.
aliases: 派单路由规则,分仓规则,路由规则,仓库路由

name: Order Cancel Validation Rule
description: Validates whether a sales order is eligible for cancellation based on its current fulfillment state.
content: Rule objective: prevent cancellation of orders already shipped or in irreversible stages. Decision conditions: check order status, check WMS progress. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: allow or reject cancellation.
aliases: 取消校验规则,撤单规则,取消验证

name: Purchase Order Processing Rule
description: Configurable rule set governing PO processing behavior including auto-receipt creation, FG staging, and sales order generation.
content: Rule objective: control PO processing automation level. Decision conditions: rule flags per merchant — auto-create receipt, enable FG staging, generate FG receipt, generate sales order, auto-create final receipt on DC callback, auto-create item, allow over-receipt. Constrained objects: Purchase Order. Post-hit action: enable or disable specific PO processing behaviors.
aliases: 采购处理规则,PO规则,PO处理策略

name: Purchase Order Dispatch Rule
description: Routing rule that determines which warehouse should receive a purchase order for inbound processing.
content: Rule objective: assign optimal warehouse for PO receipt. Decision conditions: vendor location, warehouse capacity, product category. Constrained objects: Purchase Order. Post-hit action: assign warehouse, push PO to WMS.
aliases: 采购派单规则,PO路由规则

name: Work Order Dispatch Rule
description: Routing rule that determines which warehouse should execute a work order.
content: Rule objective: assign optimal warehouse for WO execution. Decision conditions: service type, warehouse capability, capacity. Constrained objects: Work Order. Post-hit action: assign warehouse, dispatch WO.
aliases: 工单派单规则,WO路由

name: Zipcode Dispatch Filter Rule
description: Filters eligible warehouses by matching the order destination zipcode against warehouse zipcode coverage ranges.
content: Rule objective: narrow warehouse candidates to those serving the destination area. Decision conditions: order shipping zipcode falls within warehouse zipcode range. Constrained objects: Sales Order, Purchase Order. Post-hit action: include warehouse in candidate list.
aliases: 邮编过滤规则,邮编匹配,邮编路由

name: Country Dispatch Filter Rule
description: Filters eligible warehouses by matching the order destination country to keep fulfillment within the destination market.
content: Rule objective: ensure fulfillment stays within the destination country/market. Decision conditions: order destination country matches warehouse country. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: include warehouse in candidate list.
aliases: 国家过滤规则,地区过滤,国家限制

name: Single Warehouse Fulfillment Rule
description: Requires all items in an order to be fulfilled from a single warehouse without splitting.
content: Rule objective: prevent order splitting across multiple warehouses. Decision conditions: one warehouse must have sufficient inventory for all line items. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: allocate entire order to one warehouse or fail.
aliases: 单仓规则,不拆单规则,单仓履约

name: Split Fulfillment Rule
description: Allows order items to be split across multiple warehouses when no single warehouse can fulfill the entire order.
content: Rule objective: maximize fulfillment rate by allowing multi-warehouse allocation. Decision conditions: evaluate inventory across warehouses, split items to minimize warehouse count. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: create multiple dispatch records per warehouse.
aliases: 拆单规则,分仓履约规则,多仓规则,拆单策略

name: Inventory Sync Rule
description: Configurable rule governing how and when OMS inventory is synchronized with WMS physical stock.
content: Rule objective: maintain inventory accuracy between OMS and WMS. Decision conditions: sync frequency, sync scope (full/delta), reconciliation tolerance. Constrained objects: Inventory. Post-hit action: trigger sync process, flag discrepancies.
aliases: 库存同步规则,同步配置,同步策略

name: Rate Shopping Selection Rule
description: Rule governing carrier and service selection criteria during rate shopping evaluation.
content: Rule objective: select optimal carrier/service based on cost, delivery speed, and service constraints. Decision conditions: compare rates across carriers, apply merchant preferences, check service availability. Constrained objects: Rate Shopping Request. Post-hit action: assign carrier and service to order.
aliases: 运费选择规则,比价规则,运费策略

name: Webhook Event Routing Rule
description: Rule determining which webhook endpoints receive which order event types.
content: Rule objective: route order events to appropriate external webhook endpoints. Decision conditions: event type, merchant configuration, endpoint registration. Constrained objects: Webhook Event. Post-hit action: dispatch event to matching endpoints.
aliases: webhook路由规则,回调路由,事件路由

name: Email Notification Trigger Rule
description: Rule determining when email notifications should be sent based on order event categories.
content: Rule objective: trigger email notifications for configured order event categories. Decision conditions: event type matches notification category, merchant has email settings configured. Constrained objects: Email Notification Setting. Post-hit action: send email to configured recipients.
aliases: 邮件触发规则,通知规则,邮件策略

name: Order Merge Rule
description: Rule governing which orders can be merged and the merge window duration.
content: Rule objective: consolidate compatible orders to reduce shipping costs. Decision conditions: same customer, same destination, within merge window timeframe, compatible order types. Constrained objects: Sales Order. Post-hit action: add order to merge window.
aliases: 合单规则,合并规则,并单规则

name: Return Eligibility Rule
description: Rule validating whether an order is eligible for return based on time window and item conditions.
content: Rule objective: validate return eligibility. Decision conditions: within return window, items in returnable condition, order was shipped. Constrained objects: Return Order. Post-hit action: allow or reject return creation.
aliases: 退货资格规则,退货规则,退货校验

name: DO to SO Status Sync Rule
description: Governs how Delivery Order state changes propagate back to update the originating Sales Order status.
content: Rule objective: keep SO status in sync with logistics reality. Key mappings: DO PickupCompleted - SO remains Shipped; DO DeliveryFailed - SO stays Shipped (logistics layer handles retry); DO ReturnToShipper - triggers Update Sales Order on Return To Shipper process (SO transitions to Return Started); DO Delivered - SO can transition to Closed. Implementation: WMS and TMS callbacks route through SalesOrderStatusConsumer, which evaluates this rule to determine SO state update.
aliases: DO-SO状态同步规则,物流状态回传规则,配送状态同步

name: Delivery Failure Retry Rule
description: Defines the number of delivery attempts and conditions under which a failed delivery escalates to Return To Shipper.
content: Rule objective: balance re-delivery attempts with RTS escalation. Logic: after each Delivery Failed event, system checks retry count; if below threshold, reschedule to Pending Delivery; if at maximum attempts or Consignee Refusal received, escalate to Return To Shipper. Note: specific retry count not hardcoded in OMS - governed by carrier agreement and configurable per merchant. Related states: DeliveryFailed (51), ConsigneeRefusal (52) to ReturnToShipper (55).
aliases: 配送失败重试规则,重派规则,RTS升级规则

name: Tracking Update Timeout Rule
description: Defines the threshold after which a Delivery Order with no carrier tracking update is flagged for investigation.
content: Rule objective: detect stale tracking and trigger proactive exception handling. Mechanism: Monitor Tracking Updates process checks Delivery Order Tracking Log; if elapsed time since last entry exceeds configured threshold (carrier/service-specific), flags DO for operator review. Note: OMS receives tracking via DELIVERY_TRACKING webhook events (event-driven, not polled); no automatic alert in base system - this rule requires merchant-specific configuration or external monitoring.
aliases: 物流更新超时规则,追踪超时规则,轨迹停滞规则

name: Lost Parcel Declaration Rule
description: Defines the conditions under which an Incomplete delivery order is escalated to Parcel Lost status by operators.
content: Rule objective: provide clear criteria for declaring a package lost. Conditions: (1) DO in Incomplete state; (2) carrier SLA investigation window has elapsed without resolution; (3) carrier has confirmed inability to locate package. Action: operator manually declares DO as Parcel Lost; carrier claim filed; replacement or refund initiated. Note: OMS has no automated LOST enum - this is a procedural rule enforced by the operations team.
aliases: 丢件声明规则,包裹丢失规则,lost parcel规则

name: Backlog Re-dispatch Priority Rule
description: Defines the ordering logic for re-dispatching Sales Orders stuck in Exception state after inventory is restocked.
content: Rule objective: fairly process backlogged orders when new inventory arrives. Current implementation: no explicit priority queue in OMS; re-dispatch candidates are evaluated in order creation timestamp sequence (FIFO) when the re-dispatch trigger fires. Re-dispatch is NOT automatic - it requires manual trigger or a periodic batch job. After restocking, operator initiates re-dispatch; system applies standard dispatch routing rules to evaluate available inventory.
aliases: 积压订单重派优先规则,缺货积压规则,backlog重派规则
